name: workflow-security-preflight
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,safety-gates,quality-gates{security,git,hygiene},deterministic-output | lens: nist-rmf | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: SECURITY_STAGE
required_inputs.description: When the gate runs. Defaults to `github-commit` unless release intent is explicit.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Scope to inspect. Defaults to `diff` for commit and `repo` for release.

required_inputs.name: SENSITIVE_SURFACES
required_inputs.description: Files, directories, vendors, or boundaries to prioritize.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_ALLOWED_PUBLIC_CONFIGS
required_inputs.description: Explicit allowlist for intentionally tracked public client config such as build-required Firebase plist/json files.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Existing scan results, alerts, or prior decisions.
